{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323144852CD49749A2DD9B4F74927"}"},"total":243},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7327988011635557182","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大更新很勤奋，文也蛮新颖的。
男主应该是丧尸化的理智人，女主就是天选进化的异能者。青梅竹马哦~
剧情和内容都比较合理，而且很密集，几乎都是很惊险刺激的。就是那几个讨厌鬼到130章还在，看的火大，直接跳过了，结果那个郑梦梦还不下线，女主现在以为是失去了男主悲痛欲绝变的更强了。其他人遇见郑梦梦就走不动路了，一个个善良善良好姑凉，受不了。女主刚刚开始还是毁灭不了人性的善良，留下好多祸患，也是为了后面推动剧情。大大加油吧！","text_exts":[{"e":48,"s":44,"text":"青梅竹马","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774248532B4F74927%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227327988011635557182%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227313808425777892414%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%9D%92%E6%A2%85%E7%AB%B9%E9%A9%AC%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706208420,"group_id":"7313808425777892414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"欢迎来到梦灵的梦幻世界~","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3HgWadGYsFFyt/djc5DSYA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68f6d24cc696414a9ca9fffbc7dea77e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794371&x-signature=xgB2CM4baZoArpEb4tIZak2dEyo%3D","user_id":"756074786343607","user_name":"梦灵香芋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"756074786343607","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742273343,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7313808425777892414","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+女强+丧尸+异能+成长流】
全球尸变，末日降临！
平日和蔼的老师变成丧尸，校园变成了人间炼狱。
至此，人类进入黑暗时代，丧尸、怪物接连来袭……
面对突然而来的巨变，本应该坐在校园读书的平凡女大学生安诺，只能无奈撸起袖子，拿起武器，从校园开启求生之旅…

【注】：全文架空背景，请勿代入现实。
无重生、无穿越、无系统、剧情流。
主角成长流，杀伐果断，也会坚持本心，有道德三观。
有cp、邵轻洲，他不是丧尸，感情线少。

don’t care!但你傷害男主，我會找你找到天涯海角也要報仇！誰懂，在男主面前女主才會有一點少女心，rua小老虎是最可愛的！！！但鄭夢夢為甚麼還未下線？她真的很討厭！雖然她可能跟催生那些有關係。還有男主甚麼時候回來！捉走他的人是誰呢？幕後大boss嘛？女主跟峰又會有甚麼淵緣呢？期待鴨！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705930127,"group_id":"7313808425777892414","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一個平平無奇的書呆子","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/PefhJntCwHsJhQrhaDUeUGAb8QLBN6aFR3Wu8VhbX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4330331408707235","user_name":"Ssszzzeee"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4330331408707235","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7313808425777892414","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+女强+丧尸+异能+成长流】
